series_metadata.series_title: EXCLUSIONARY FORMULARY ADOPTED BY THE BOARD ON OR AFTER MAY 17, 2017
series_metadata.series_description: The formulary established by the Board Committee on Prescriptive Governance, on or after May 17, 2017, which must be posted on the Board website according to OAC 4723-9-10.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current formulary on Board website as required by OAC 4723-9-10; retain past editions of formulary permanently in paper or electronic form at Board office. ; Electronic: Retain current formulary on Board website as required by OAC 4723-9-10; retain past editions of formulary permanently in paper or electronic form at Board office., Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
